_comment: NPC: Warehouse Clerk Hao (库房吏郝). INFERRED: Nan Dou City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Warehouse Clerk Hao

perception_tiers.mortal: A service of Nan Dou City
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Warehouse Clerk Hao, Nan Dou service

note: INFERRED: Nan Dou City service. nervous, follows orders, notices discrepancies.
initiation_lines: All goods entering the warehouse must be logged. I log them. That is my job. I do not ask questions about what is missing.
The manifests say twenty crates of wheat arrived last night. I counted fifteen. The other five... I did not count the other five.
If you need to store goods, there is a fee. Planks for crates, paper for manifests. Standard procedure.
The dock master and the smuggler have an arrangement. I do not know what it is. I do not want to know what it is.

sect_tasks.description: Hao: 'I need paper and ink for manifests, planks for crate repairs. The tribute shipment is due next week and everything must be in order.'
Hao looks nervous: 'Goods keep disappearing from the warehouse. If you find iron and cobblestone being moved through the tunnels at night, report to the guard captain — not to me.'
